content.en:
Of course, it didn't matter if Ye Tian didn't gain anything, the focus was on that drop of the blood of the Abyssal Star Ultimate Creature and the opportunity to enter the main body of the Abyss Star in person.

At this time, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable took out that drop of the blood of the ultimate creature and handed it to Ye Tian.

"This is the blood of that Abyssal Star Ultimate Creature!"

Ye Tian took this drop of the blood of the ultimate creature of the Abyssal Star, and felt its power, as well as the power of the Abyssal Star, this power has been transformed into the power of the other party, which is still different from the power of the Abyssal Star, but it can give Ye Tian a lot of inspiration.

Ye Tian took it away and waited to study it slowly.

"I'll take you to the inside of the Abyssal Star again, where the Abyssal Star Ultimate Creature was suppressed!"

The Giant Axe Jizun was very trustworthy and took Ye Tian over directly.

It was just an incarnation, but Ye Tian felt the power that he couldn't resist.

"What a terrifying strength, this is still an incarnation, how powerful is the real Ultimate Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon.

They entered the interior of the Abyssal Star, where there was a huge space, and the ultimate creature of the Abyssal Star was locked in countless chains, making it unable to move.

Now.

Ye Tiancai truly saw the true face of this supreme creature.

It is covered in barbs, its body tends to be round and spherical, and it has a large number of scales, which is very tough at first sight.

"This is the ultimate creature of the Abyssal Star - Abyssal Taki!"

Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said.

"Such an ultimate creature is actually not powerful, there are many in the Dimensional Sea, but its body is really too strong, plus it can absorb the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star, there is no way to kill it. The giant axe said with great dignity.

"Giant Axe Extreme Venerable Senior, why don't you want to destroy the main body of the Yuan Star?" Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, that won't destroy at all. The Giant Axe Extreme Zun shook his head, "Don't look at some Abyssal Star fragments in the Dimensional Sea, in fact, those fragments are equivalent to the skin of the Abyssal Star Body, they are just some skin fragments, the closer the Abyssal Star Body is to the inside, the denser it becomes, and the tougher the matter is." We, the Ultimate Realm Lords, can destroy a layer of the shell of the Abyssal Star Body, but we can't destroy the entire Abyssal Star Body. Moreover, the main body of the Abyssal Star has the ability to repair itself, and the little damage caused to the main body of the Abyss at the beginning has long since been restored. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

"Little guy, you are cultivating here, I will protect you and not let you be crushed by the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star. The giant axe said with great dignity.

"Thank you Giant Axe Extreme Venerable Senior!"

Ye Tian thanks.

If it weren't for the power of the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable, he wouldn't have been able to get here, and he wouldn't have been able to withstand the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star.

It was really his strength that was too weak to compete with the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star.

Next.

Ye Tian sat here cross-legged to study this ultimate creature named Yuanlong.

Time passed slowly like this, and after studying for a period of time, Yuan Long suddenly woke up, and with a roar, almost shattering Ye Tian's body.

"Calm me down!"

The giant axe Jizun snorted coldly, and the chain began to suppress Yuanlong, making Yuanlong continue to scream, and finally coaxed, not daring to be arrogant anymore.

"Little one, you go on with enlightenment. "

The giant axe is extremely respectful.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian continued to comprehend.

And just like that, another long time passed.

Ye Tian also had a better understanding of the Abyssal Star System by comprehending the Abyssal Ultimate Creature.

The Abyssal Ultimate Creature itself is the Abyssal Star System, but it still hasn't stepped into that step, otherwise Ye Tian would not be able to use the Abyss Star System to impact the Ultimate Realm Main Realm.

And Yuanlong was suppressed, and it had no chance to become the Ultimate Realm Master.

And observing Yuanlong is equivalent to observing a nearly complete Yuanxing system, maybe Yuanlong's Yuanxing Ultimate System is not suitable for Ye Tian, but it has reference significance.

this day.

The giant axe said: "Little guy, the time is almost up, you have to go out!"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian left here with the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable and returned to the outside world.

Although the Great Axe Exalted said that he made a deal with him, it was impossible for him to protect him all the time, which would leave his avatar with no time to do other things.

After returning to the outside world.

Ye Tian began to study the drop of blood in the Abyssal Dragon, and just a drop of blood contained more mysteries of the Abyssal Star System.

At the same time, he also mobilized various treasures to help him analyze and comprehend, allowing him to gradually comprehend more of the mysteries of the Yuanxing system.

In a flash, hundreds of millions of yuan have passed.

Ye Tian had already exhausted that drop of Yuanlong's blood, but he had finally perfected the Yuanxing Ultimate System again.

And he continued to comprehend the main body of the Abyss Star, and he continued to comprehend, and finally let him comprehend a trace of the ultimate rules of the Abyss Star this day.

......

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with a wisp of the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, and a large amount of Abyssal Star's energy poured into his body from the main body of the Abyssal Star, helping his body to complete the transformation of the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body again.

Seeing Ye Tian's aura getting stronger and stronger, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable was shocked.

"'He actually comprehended the ultimate rules of the Abyssal Star so quickly, and he was really evil, could it be that he was born to follow the Abyssal Star System?" thought to himself.

He really wanted to exchange the Yuanxing System perception with Ye Tian again, but he also knew that Ye Tian would definitely not exchange again.

After comprehending the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, Ye Tian's Abyss Star System is actually almost perfect, and the follow-up is to strengthen the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, and when it grows to a certain extent, the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body is complete, and he can go to the main realm of the Ultimate Realm.

If Ye Tian handed over the Yuanxing System Perception to him, he might be able to break through faster!

After all, the opportunities and resources he has at his disposal are far from being comparable to Ye Tian, and no one (Nuo Wang Zhao) wants to give up the Yuanxing system he created with great difficulty to others, wouldn't it be a fool!)

"Forget it!"

The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable still gave up, he didn't think about threatening Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's body was just a clone, he could indeed bombard all of Ye Tian's clones and body, but the Ultimate Realm Lord of the Void Heaven Palace would definitely take action to protect Ye Tian.

Unless he entered the Multidimensional Territory Void Heaven Palace, it would be impossible for him to destroy Ye Tian.

If he really made a move, he would offend Ye Tian, such a demonic Nine Realms peak, unless he fell in the process of impacting the Ultimate Realm Lord, once he broke through to the Ultimate Realm Lord, his strength would inevitably surpass him.

At that time, he offended a great enemy, and this was to make trouble for himself!

Therefore, he still resisted the temptation of the complete Abyssal Star System, and honestly continued to study his Abyssal Star System, striving to make his body stronger.
